LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO KERN COUNTY (BAKERSFIELD) AND PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY ALL REQUIRED TRANSFER FEES. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FROM OF ORDER. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, TEL. 415.551.5868, EMAILS: TORREANOM@AOL.COM/MTOREANO@SFTC.ORG. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of And Motion To Transfer Venue To Kern County
Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's motion to transfer venue is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to Kern County (Bakersfield) and plaintiff is to pay all required transfer fees. The moving party is to prepare a from of order. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, Tel. 415.551.5868, Emails: torreanom@aol.com/mtoreano@sftc.org. =(302/RBU)
